auth.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue
auth.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.otp_subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to your email
auth.change_password_subtitle: You must change your password before continuing
auth.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.password_uppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
auth.password_lowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
auth.password_special: Password must contain a special character
auth.password_requirements: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
auth.change_password_error: Failed to change password. Please try again.

communities.add_subtitle: Create a new community with details and assignments.
communities.name: Community Name
communities.area_hint: Use Google Places API or polygon service to define boundaries
communities.officers_hint: Choose officers to assign to this community
communities.posts_hint: Add posts in this community (for example: main gate...)
communities.map_entry_hint: Upload map, add assets, posts, entry/exit points and high-priority zones.
communities.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

residents.search_placeholder: Search by name, phone, email, address...
residents.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
residents.mobile_hint: Used by the resident to enter the app
residents.communication_test_hint: Allows resident to send emergency test calls
residents.vehicle_hint: Press Enter or click Add to add multiple vehicles
residents.mobile_change_warning: If mobile number is changed, the resident must be identified again before login
residents.vehicle_readonly_hint: Vehicle numbers cannot be edited from this screen

map.title: 2D Map Management
map.no_map_subtitle: Click "Create a map" to upload the area map for this community.
map.hint_single: Click on the map to place a marker
map.hint_batch: Click to mark multiple locations, then complete
map.post_name_max: Post name must be 60 characters or less
map.delete_item_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
map.select_item_type: What would you like to add?
map.asset_hint: Doors, windows, cameras, sensors and other physical items
map.post_hint: Officer posts and patrol locations on site
map.entry_exit_hint: Mark entry and exit points of the community area
map.zone_hint: Mark areas that require special attention or high priority

featured_officer.title: Featured Officer
featured_officer.description: Manage the banner displayed in the community resident app, under the Officer Information screen.
featured_officer.image_hint: Recommended size: 600×300px. Max 5MB. JPG, PNG, WEBP.
featured_officer.description_placeholder: Enter a description to display under the banner image...
featured_officer.description_hint: Plain text only — no special formatting.
featured_officer.default_note: If the banner is deleted or empty, the app will display the default banner design.
featured_officer.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete the current banner? The app will show the default banner instead.
featured_officer.error_image_type: Please upload a valid image file (JPG, PNG, WEBP).
featured_officer.error_image_size: Image size must be less than 5MB.

officers.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
officers.title: Title

types.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this type?
types.empty: No types found. Add your first type above.
types.add_service_description: Create a new service or incident type for residents to report.
types.add_maintenance_description: Create a new maintenance report type for officers to use.

asset_types.add_description: Create a new asset type with icon and colour for the map.

post_order_sections.client_visible_hint: Visible to clients when viewing post orders
post_order_sections.active_hint: Only active types appear when creating new post orders
post_order_sections.add_description: Create a new post order section type.
post_order_sections.edit_description: Update the post order section type details.

notifications.page_subtitle: Configure how and when push notifications are sent to users.
notifications.channels_desc: Select which channels notifications are sent through. Default is all channels.
notifications.channel_in_app_desc: Notifications shown within the portal and officer app
notifications.channel_email_desc: Notifications delivered to the user's email address
notifications.channel_mobile_desc: Push notifications on the officer's mobile device
notifications.sender_desc: Define the display name shown as the notification sender.
notifications.sender_name_hint: Defaults to the contractor company name if left empty.
notifications.title_desc: Define the default title shown in push notifications.
notifications.notification_title_hint: Defaults to the app name if left empty.
notifications.triggers_desc: Select which events trigger a push notification. Default is all events.

poi.page_subtitle: Configure record management parameters and default response guidance texts.
poi.parameters_desc: Configure renewal reminders, archive thresholds, and export options.
poi.renewal_reminder_hint: Days before Trespass/Red Card expiry to send renewal reminder. Default: 14 days.
poi.archive_threshold_hint: Months after expiry or inactivating before a record becomes eligible for archiving. Default: 24 months.
poi.pdf_export_hint: Whether admin PDF export is available for POI records.
poi.guidance_desc: Default guidance displayed to officers for each record type. Can be edited per record.
poi.poi_guidance_placeholder: Enter default guidance for POI records...
poi.trespass_guidance_placeholder: Enter default guidance for Trespass Order records...
poi.red_card_guidance_placeholder: Enter default guidance for Metro Red Card records...

gps.page_subtitle: Configure GPS transmission intervals, alert thresholds, and map provider.
gps.intervals_desc: How often officer location updates are sent during patrol and emergency response.
gps.interval_normal_hint: How often the officer app sends a location update during a standard patrol. Default: 30s. Range: 10–120s.
gps.interval_emergency_hint: Update interval when an officer is responding to an emergency call. Default: 10s. Range: 5–30s.
gps.eta_interval_hint: How often ETA is recalculated using the Maps API during an emergency response. Default: 60s.
gps.map_refresh_hint: How often the Live Tracking map reloads data in the manager portal. Default: 30s.
gps.thresholds_desc: Configure when alerts are triggered and how long data is retained.
gps.stale_threshold_hint: How long without a GPS update before an amber alert is triggered. Default: 2 min.
gps.compliance_threshold_hint: Minutes overdue at a waypoint before triggering a skip alert. Default: 15 min.
gps.history_retention_hint: How long raw GPS tracks are stored. Default: 90 days.
gps.map_provider_desc: Map service used for live tracking and route optimisation.
gps.restore_defaults_confirm: This will reset all GPS & Tracking settings to their factory defaults. This action cannot be undone.

working_hours.page_subtitle: Configure maximum working hour limits for officers.
working_hours.officers_desc: Set the maximum number of hours an officer can work per day.

users.reset_password_message: Are you sure you want to reset the password for {name}? They will receive a new initial password and must change it on next login.
users.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
